arts.ttl: 'Been told': Arsenal and Tottenham both monitoring 'special' talent wanted across Europe - journalist
Arsenal captain Martin Odegaard in complete agreement with Cole Palmer on toughest opponent
arts.sum: Arsenal skipper Martin Odegaard and Chelsea superstar Cole Palmer might represent different sides of London football but they agree on who their most formidable opponent is. Chelsea's rising star Palmer also singled out Van Dijk as his toughest adversary earlier this season.

arts.ttl: David Raya highlights Sporting CP's danger ahead of Champions League clash
arts.sum: Arsenal goalkeeper David Raya has admitted one Sporting CP player in particular could cause problems for the Gunners in Champions League clash.

arts.ttl: Viktor Gyokeres Stats: Why Swedish superstar should be top of Arsenal's January wishlist
arts.sum: If you thought the international break would slow Viktor Gyokeres down, then you were certainly mistaken. Sweden have one of the most potent frontlines on the international stage, with Dejan Kulusevsk...

arts.ttl: David Raya reveals Arsenal plan for Viktor Gyokeres as Mikel Arteta sent five-word message
arts.sum: "We know his strengths, how he runs a lot in behind and scores a lot in one-v-one and he is a top player in form," said Raya, speaking to reporters at a press conference on Monday. He's enjoyed a brilliant vein of form in the Champions League too, netting a hat-trick against Manchester City earlier this month to maintain Portuguese club's unbeaten run.

arts.ttl: Latest Arsenal injury news as Mikel Arteta provides Declan Rice update before Sporting clash
arts.sum: Speaking to reporters, Arteta confirmed that the defender is going to be ruled out for 'months'. "We have Kieran Tierney after a long injury, it’s great news that he’s back," said Arteta.

arts.ttl: What Arsenal need to qualify for Champions League knockout stages amid play-off possibility
arts.sum: Arsenal boss Mikel Arteta will be hoping his side can continue to kick-off following Saturday's 3-0 win over Nottingham Forest. A run of four league games without a win had placed the north Londoners' title chances in limbo.

arts.ttl: Arsenal set for Viktor Gyokeres meeting after Mikel Arteta delivers verdict on transfer target
arts.sum: Gyokeres has another 24 goals and four assists in 19 appearances for Sporting this season, with five of those goals coming in four Champions League matches. Arsenal will finally get a proper first-hand look at one of the players most heavily linked with a move to the Emirates Stadium in the last transfer window on Tuesday night.

arts.ttl: Declan Rice early Champions League team news hint dropped as Arsenal star sends message
arts.sum: Jorginho has hinted that he may again start for Arsenal in their midweek Champions League match against Sporting in Lisbon tonight. His appearances in the Gunners' side this season have largely been in place of Rice, as was the case against Forest and in mid-September's North London Derby at the Tottenham Hotspur Stadium, which the England international missed through suspension.

arts.ttl: Arda Guler to Arsenal? Fabrizio Romano reveals the truth
arts.sum: Fabrizio Romano insists that Real Madrid have no intention of loaning out Arda Guler despite frequent enquiries. However, Fabrizio Romano has now ruled out a transfer of Guler as Real Madrid keep rebuffing any and all approaches for the teenager.
